title: Chili Bullet Weapons
body:
# Chili Bullet Weapons

This mod adds chili peppers, foods and, weapons.

![Mod Items](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Iunius118/ChiliBulletWeapons/refs/heads/main/docs/media/item/misc/items_v2.0.0.png)

Version 2 or later requires the [CBW Chili Peppers and Foods](https://modrinth.com/mod/cbw-chili-peppers-and-foods) mod.

## Requirements

- NeoForge version - NeoForge
- Forge version - Minecraft Forge
- Fabric version - Fabric Loader, Fabric API, and Cloth Config API
- CBW Chili Peppers and Foods (only Chili Bullet Weapons v2+)

## How to Get Started

### 1. Obtain Curved Chili Pepper

Curved chili peppers can be obtained from breaking short grass.

![Dropped curved chili pepper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TDVQf0jm/images/184e6f7e9bf066ef9236bf2c9cbf89b5463d4a79.png)

### 2. Craft Chili Pepper Seeds

Chili pepper seeds can be crafted from curved chili pepper.

![Crafting chili pepper seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TDVQf0jm/images/3dcc16825161ae149d4e9a0c743195e857e94a70.png)

### 3. Grow Chili Pepper Crops

Chili pepper seeds can be placed on farmland by right-clicking, where they grow through eight stages.

![Growing chili pepper crops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TDVQf0jm/images/e280523f718b729f0213a3d56b6faf13341e2528.png)

Breaking the final stage produces 1 to 3 curved chili peppers and 1 to 3 bullet-like chili peppers.

### Read More Mod Descriptions

- [Version 3](https://iunius118.github.io/ChiliBulletWeapons/) for Minecraft 26.1.2
- [Version 2](https://iunius118.github.io/ChiliBulletWeapons/v2/index.html) for Minecraft 1.21.1
- [Version 1](https://iunius118.github.io/ChiliBulletWeapons/v1/index.html) for Minecraft 1.20.1-1.20.4
